title: QR Refresh Recovery
purpose: Teach the agent how to refresh the display QR for scanner problems without changing payment truth.
when_to_use: The human reports Alipay sandbox says order not found.
The QR expired or the wallet cannot load it.
The payment intent is still not verified.

commands.intent: refresh the QR display for the same payment intent

agent_rules: QR refresh is display recovery only.
After refresh, continue waiting through the normal wait contract.
forbidden: Do not treat refresh as paid.
Do not query Alipay from buyer flow.
Do not create a new checkout unless the user explicitly abandons the old one.
